title: Design Network Topology & VPC Terraform
description: Define VPC, public/private subnets, NAT Gateways, and Route Tables in Terraform to support secure EKS execution.
acceptance_criteria: Terraform plan passes; VPC created with 3 AZs; Private subnets isolated
definition_of_done: Infrastructure deployed to staging; Connectivity verified
business_value: Fundamental network layer for all services

title: Provision RDS PostgreSQL with pgvector
description: Script the creation of a Multi-AZ RDS instance. Configure parameter groups to enable the `pgvector` extension.
acceptance_criteria: RDS accessible from private subnet; pgvector installed
definition_of_done: Connection test successful; Extension verified active
business_value: Database layer for relational and vector data

title: Provision EKS Cluster & Node Groups
description: Deploy EKS Control Plane and Managed Node Groups using Terraform. Configure IAM roles for Service Accounts (IRSA).
acceptance_criteria: Cluster ACTIVE; Worker nodes registered; kubectl connected

title: Provision Cognito User Pools
description: Terraform configuration for User Pools, App Clients, and Identity Pools. Configure attribute mapping and MFA enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: User Pool created; MFA enabled for admins
definition_of_done: User can be created via AWS CLI

title: Define Database Schema & DTOs
description: Create Prisma/TypeORM schema for Vendor and Client. Define DTOs with class-validator decorators.
acceptance_criteria: Migration scripts generated; DTOs enforce validation

title: Implement Vendor CRUD Logic
description: Develop Service methods and Controller endpoints for Vendor management (Create, Read, Update, Soft Delete).
acceptance_criteria: All CRUD endpoints functional; Pagination implemented
definition_of_done: Endpoints accessible via Swagger; Tests passing

title: S3 Bucket Configuration & Presigned URL Service
description: Configure S3 bucket with KMS encryption. Implement service to generate presigned PUT URLs for secure direct uploads.
acceptance_criteria: Private bucket provisioned; Presigned URL generation works

title: Worker Infrastructure & SQS Consumer
description: Setup Python service structure, Docker container, and SQS listener loop.
acceptance_criteria: Service connects to SQS; Messages consumed
definition_of_done: Worker deployed and processing test events

title: PII Detection & Redaction (AWS Comprehend)
description: Integrate AWS Comprehend to identify PII entities. Implement replacement logic to sanitize text.
acceptance_criteria: PII identified and redacted; Performance acceptable

title: Stripe Service Configuration
description: Setup Stripe SDK, configure secret keys, and implement basic wrapper methods for Invoice creation.
acceptance_criteria: Stripe API calls succeed; Keys secured

title: Implement Saga Pattern / Distributed Transaction
description: Implement orchestration logic to ensure atomic operations across DB and External APIs. Handle rollbacks/compensation.
acceptance_criteria: Transactions atomic; Compensation logic working; Data consistent

title: Proposal Form Layout & Validation Schema
description: Create Zod schema for proposal data. Build React Hook Form layout with Cost, Timeline, and Team fields.
acceptance_criteria: Validation functional; Form accessible; UI matches design
